ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 移至 Obsidian 回收站（.trash 文件夹）

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Requires a restart to take effect

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: The overview will show the subfolders and files of the folder you choose here.
ast.target: 概览将显示您在此处选择的文件夹的子文件夹和文件。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: The regexes and wildcards are only for the folder name, not the path.
ast.target: 正则表达式和通配符仅适用于文件夹名称，不适用于路径。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: If you want to switch to a folder path delete the pattern first.
ast.target: 如果您想切换到文件夹路径，请先删除模式。

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 重命名现有文件夹笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if the subfolders of the folder should also be excluded
ast.target: 选择是否也应排除该文件夹的子文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if the folder note should be renamed when the folder name is changed
ast.target: 选择当文件夹名称更改时是否应重命名文件夹笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if the folder should be shown in the folder overview
ast.target: 选择是否应在文件夹概览中显示该文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if the folder note should be shown in the file explorer
ast.target: 选择是否应在文件资源管理器中显示文件夹笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if a folder note should be created when a new folder is created
ast.target: 选择创建新文件夹时是否应创建文件夹笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if the folder note should be opened when the folder is opened
ast.target: 选择打开文件夹时是否应打开文件夹笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if the folder should be collapsed when the folder note is opened
ast.target: 选择打开文件夹笔记时是否应折叠该文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if the folder name should be renamed when the file name has been changed
ast.target: 选择当文件名更改时是否应重命名文件夹名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if a folder note should be created when a new folder is created that matches this pattern
ast.target: 选择当创建匹配此模式的新文件夹时是否应创建文件夹笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if the subfolders of the folder should also be whitelisted
ast.target: 选择是否也应将该文件夹的子文件夹加入白名单

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if the name of a folder note should be renamed when the folder name is changed
ast.target: 选择当文件夹名称更改时是否应重命名文件夹笔记的名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if the folder note should be hidden in the file explorer
ast.target: 选择是否应在文件资源管理器中隐藏文件夹笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if the folder note should be opened when you click on the folder
ast.target: 选择单击文件夹时是否应打开文件夹笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the file extension for the folder notes.
ast.target: 选择文件夹笔记的文件扩展名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Every folder note that matches this name will be renamed to the new folder note name.
ast.target: 所有匹配此名称的文件夹笔记都将重命名为新的文件夹笔记名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Every folder note that matches the old folder note name will be renamed to this name.
ast.target: 所有匹配旧文件夹笔记名称的文件夹笔记都将重命名为此名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: All folder notes will use this name. Use {{folder_name}} to insert the folder’s name. Existing notes won’t update automatically; click on the button to apply the new name.
ast.target: 所有文件夹笔记都将使用此名称。使用 {{folder_name}} 插入文件夹的名称。现有笔记不会自动更新；请单击按钮以应用新名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use the actual folder name in the tab title instead of the custom folder note name (e.g., "folder note").
ast.target: 在标签页标题中使用实际的文件夹名称，而不是自定义的文件夹笔记名称（例如，“folder note”）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the default file type (canvas, Markdown, ...) used when creating new folder notes.
ast.target: 选择创建新文件夹笔记时使用的默认文件类型（画布、Markdown 等）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Can be used with templater/templates plugin. If you add the location of the templates there.
ast.target: 可与 templater/templates 插件配合使用。如果您在那里添加了模板的位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose where to store the folder notes
ast.target: 选择存储文件夹笔记的位置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delete the folder note when deleting the folder
ast.target: 删除文件夹时删除文件夹笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Move the folder note file along with the folder when it is moved
ast.target: 移动文件夹时，将文件夹笔记文件随文件夹一起移动

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The key combination to create a folder note
ast.target: 创建文件夹笔记的按键组合

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the combination to open a folder note
ast.target: 选择打开文件夹笔记的组合键

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Ask for confirmation before deleting a folder note
ast.target: 删除文件夹笔记前要求确认

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: What happens to the folder note after you delete it
ast.target: 删除文件夹笔记后会发生什么

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Always open folder notes in a new tab unless the note is already open in the current tab.
ast.target: 始终在新标签页中打开文件夹笔记，除非笔记已在当前标签页中打开。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If a folder note is already open in a tab, focus that tab instead of creating a new one.
ast.target: 如果文件夹笔记已在某个标签页中打开，则聚焦该标签页，而不是创建新标签页。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically rename the folder note when the folder name is changed
ast.target: 当文件夹名称更改时自动重命名文件夹笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Generate folder notes for every folder in the vault.
ast.target: 为保险库中的每个文件夹生成文件夹笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically create a folder note whenever a new folder is added.
ast.target: 每当添加新文件夹时自动创建文件夹笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the folder note immediately after it’s created automatically.
ast.target: 自动创建文件夹笔记后立即打开它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Also automatically create folder notes for attachment folders (e.g., "attachments", "media", etc.).
ast.target: 也为附件文件夹（例如“attachments”、“media”等）自动创建文件夹笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically create a folder note when a regular note is created inside a folder. Works for supported file types only.
ast.target: 当在文件夹内创建常规笔记时自动创建文件夹笔记。仅适用于支持的文件类型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Restore the same settings tab after restarting Obsidian.
ast.target: 重启 Obsidian 后恢复相同的设置标签页。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keep the current settings tab open during the session, but reset it after a restart or reload.
ast.target: 在会话期间保持当前设置标签页打开，但在重启或重新加载后重置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide the folder note file from appearing in the file explorer
ast.target: 在文件资源管理器中隐藏文件夹笔记文件，使其不显示

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prevents folder notes from opening when tapping the folder name or surrounding area on mobile devices. They can now only be opened via the context menu or a command.
ast.target: 防止在移动设备上点击文件夹名称或周围区域时打开文件夹笔记。现在只能通过上下文菜单或命令打开它们。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only allow folder notes to open when clicking directly on the folder name in the file explorer
ast.target: 仅允许在文件资源管理器中直接单击文件夹名称时打开文件夹笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, folders in the file explorer will only collapse when clicking the collapse icon next to the folder name, not when clicking near a folder name when it has a folder note.
ast.target: 启用后，文件资源管理器中的文件夹仅在单击文件夹名称旁边的折叠图标时才会折叠，而不是在单击具有文件夹笔记的文件夹名称附近时折叠。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 为文件/文件夹命令使用子菜单

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically update the folder name in the file explorer when the front matter title plugin is enabled and the title for a folder note is changed in the front matter. This will not change the file name, only the displayed name in the file explorer.
ast.target: 当启用 front matter title 插件并且在 front matter 中更改了文件夹笔记的标题时，自动更新文件资源管理器中的文件夹名称。这不会更改文件名，只会更改文件资源管理器中显示的名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Highlight the folder in the file explorer when it has a folder note and the folder note is open in the editor
ast.target: 当文件夹具有文件夹笔记且文件夹笔记在编辑器中打开时，在文件资源管理器中高亮显示该文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide the collapse icon in the file explorer next to the name of a folder when a folder only contains a folder note
ast.target: 当文件夹仅包含一个文件夹笔记时，在文件资源管理器中隐藏文件夹名称旁边的折叠图标

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide the collapse icon in the file explorer next to the name of a folder when a folder is empty
ast.target: 当文件夹为空时，在文件资源管理器中隐藏文件夹名称旁边的折叠图标

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add an underline to folders that have a folder note in the file explorer
ast.target: 在文件资源管理器中，为拥有文件夹笔记的文件夹添加下划线

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Make the folder name bold in the file explorer when it has a folder note
ast.target: 在文件资源管理器中，当文件夹拥有文件夹笔记时，将其名称加粗

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Make the folder name cursive in the file explorer when it has a folder note
ast.target: 在文件资源管理器中，当文件夹拥有文件夹笔记时，将其名称设为斜体

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open a folder note when clicking on a folder name in the path if it is a folder note
ast.target: 如果路径中的文件夹名称是文件夹笔记，则点击时打开该文件夹笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the sidebar when opening a folder note through the path on mobile
ast.target: 在移动端，通过路径打开文件夹笔记时打开侧边栏

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the sidebar when opening a folder note through the path on desktop
ast.target: 在桌面端，通过路径打开文件夹笔记时打开侧边栏

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically update the folder name in the path when the front matter title plugin is enabled and the title for a folder note is changed in the front matter. This will not change the file name, only the displayed name in the path.
ast.target: 当启用 Front Matter Title 插件且通过 Front Matter 更改了文件夹笔记的标题时，自动更新路径中的文件夹名称。这不会更改文件名，只会更改路径中显示的名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add an underline to folders that have a folder note in the path above a note
ast.target: 在笔记上方的路径中，为拥有文件夹笔记的文件夹添加下划线

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Make the folder name bold in the path above a note when it has a folder note
ast.target: 在笔记上方的路径中，当文件夹拥有文件夹笔记时，将其名称加粗

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Make the folder name cursive in the path above a note when it has a folder note
ast.target: 在笔记上方的路径中，当文件夹拥有文件夹笔记时，将其名称设为斜体

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only show the folder name in the path and hide the folder note name.
ast.target: 仅在路径中显示文件夹名称，并隐藏文件夹笔记名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the links that appear in the graph view will be updated even when you don't have the overview open somewhere.
ast.target: 如果启用，即使您没有在任何地方打开概览，图谱视图中出现的链接也会被更新。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if the overview should automatically update when you delete, create or rename a file/folder
ast.target: 选择当您删除、创建或重命名文件/文件夹时，概览是否应自动更新

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if you want to allow drag and drop in the overview
ast.target: 选择是否允许在概览中进行拖放操作

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if the title above the folder overview should be shown
ast.target: 选择是否显示文件夹概览上方的标题

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The larger the number, the smaller the title will be displayed.
ast.target: 数字越大，标题显示得越小。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if the links in the overview should be showed in the graph view. This requires a second list under the actual overview and which is hidden by default.
ast.target: 选择概览中的链接是否应在图谱视图中显示。这需要在实际概览下方有一个默认隐藏的第二个列表。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if the links in the link list should be in wikilink format or markdown link format (e.g., [[link]] vs [link](url)).
ast.target: 选择链接列表中的链接应采用 wikilink 格式还是 markdown 链接格式（例如，[[link]] 与 [link](url)）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if the folder overview should be hidden and instead only the link list should be shown
ast.target: 选择是否隐藏文件夹概览，而只显示链接列表

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if only link list under the folder overview should be shown
ast.target: 选择是否仅显示文件夹概览下方的链接列表

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the style of the overview (grid style soon)
ast.target: 选择概览的样式（网格样式即将推出）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if the file tag should be shown after the file name
ast.target: 选择是否在文件名后显示文件标签

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if folder notes (the note itself and not the folder name) should be shown in the overview
ast.target: 选择是否在概览中显示文件夹笔记（笔记本身，而非文件夹名称）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 文件与文件夹 = +1 深度

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how the files should be sorted

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the names of folders that appear to have no files/folders in the folder overview. That's mostly the case when you set the file depth to 1.
ast.target: 在文件夹概览中显示那些似乎没有文件/子文件夹的文件夹名称。这通常发生在您将文件深度设置为 1 时。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove the collapse icon next to the folder name for folder notes when they only contain the folder note itself
ast.target: 当文件夹笔记仅包含其自身时，移除文件夹名称旁边的折叠图标

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if the collapsed condition should be stored until you restart Obsidian
ast.target: 选择折叠状态是否应保存直到您重启 Obsidian

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Collapse every folder in the file explorer in the overview by default
ast.target: 默认折叠概览中文件资源管理器里的每个文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Replace the folder/file name with the title from the Front Matter Title Plugin. This requires the plugin to be installed and enabled.
ast.target: 使用 Front Matter Title 插件中的标题替换文件夹/文件名。这需要安装并启用该插件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folders that override the excluded folders/patterns
ast.target: 覆盖排除文件夹/模式的文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Don't show folder in folder overview
ast.target: 不在文件夹概览中显示文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show folder note in the file explorer
ast.target: 在文件资源管理器中显示文件夹笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Disable auto creation of folder notes in this folder
ast.target: 禁用在此文件夹中自动创建文件夹笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Collapse folder when opening folder note
ast.target: 打开文件夹笔记时折叠文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在文件夹概览中显示文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Hide folder note in file explorer
ast.target: 在文件资源管理器中隐藏文件夹笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Allow auto creation of folder notes in this folder
ast.target: 允许在此文件夹中自动创建文件夹笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Open folder note when clicking on the folder
ast.target: 点击文件夹时打开文件夹笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Don't collapse folder when opening folder note
ast.target: 打开文件夹笔记时不折叠文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Enter the name of the extension (only the short form, e.g. "md")
ast.target: 输入扩展名（仅短格式，例如 \"md\"）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 文件夹笔记文件扩展名

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Display folder name in tab title
ast.target: 在标签页标题中显示文件夹名称

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Default file type for new folder notes
ast.target: 新文件夹笔记的默认文件类型

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Delete folder notes when deleting the folder
ast.target: 删除文件夹时删除文件夹笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Move folder notes when moving the folder
ast.target: 移动文件夹时移动文件夹笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 创建文件夹笔记的快捷键

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 打开文件夹笔记的快捷键

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Open folder note in a new tab by default
ast.target: 默认在新标签页中打开文件夹笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Focus existing tab instead of creating a new one
ast.target: 聚焦现有标签页而非创建新标签页

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Create folder notes for all folders
ast.target: 为所有文件夹创建文件夹笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 创建文件夹时自动创建

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 为附件文件夹自动创建

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Enable front matter title plugin integration
ast.target: 启用 Front Matter Title 插件集成

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 仅在会话期间保留标签页

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Disable click-to-open folder note on mobile
ast.target: 在移动端禁用点击打开文件夹笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Open folder notes by only clicking directly on the folder name
ast.target: 仅通过直接点击文件夹名称来打开文件夹笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Auto update folder name in the file explorer (front matter title plugin only)
ast.target: 自动更新文件资源管理器中的文件夹名称（仅限 Front Matter Title 插件）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Highlight folder in the file explorer
ast.target: 在文件资源管理器中高亮显示文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Hide collapse icon for every empty folder
ast.target: 为每个空文件夹隐藏折叠图标

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Hide collapse icon also when only the attachment folder is in the same folder
ast.target: 当同一文件夹中只有附件文件夹时也隐藏折叠图标

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Underline the name of folder notes
ast.target: 为文件夹笔记名称添加下划线

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Bold the name of folder notes
ast.target: 将文件夹笔记名称加粗

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Cursive the name of folder notes
ast.target: 将文件夹笔记名称设为斜体

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 通过路径打开文件夹笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Open sidebar when opening a folder note through path (mobile only)
ast.target: 通过路径打开文件夹笔记时打开侧边栏（仅限移动端）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Open sidebar when opening a folder note through path (desktop only)
ast.target: 通过路径打开文件夹笔记时打开侧边栏（仅限桌面端）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Auto update folder name in the path (front matter title plugin only)
ast.target: 自动更新路径中的文件夹名称（仅限 Front Matter Title 插件）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 为路径中的文件夹添加下划线

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 将路径中的文件夹名称加粗

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Cursive the name of folder notes in the path
ast.target: 将路径中的文件夹笔记名称设为斜体

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Hide folder note name in the path
ast.target: 在路径中隐藏文件夹笔记名称

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Auto-update links without opening the overview
ast.target: 不打开概览时自动更新链接

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show folder names of folders that appear empty in the folder overview
ast.target: 在文件夹概览中显示看似为空的文件夹的文件夹名称

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Only show empty folders which are on the first level of the folder overview
ast.target: 仅显示文件夹概览中第一层的空文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Disable collapse icon for folder notes
ast.target: 为文件夹笔记禁用折叠图标

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Collapse all in the tree by default
ast.target: 默认折叠树中的所有项

ast.name: setName
ast.target: Front Matter Title 插件集成

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Enter the old folder note name
ast.target: 输入旧的文件夹笔记名称

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Enter the new folder note name
ast.target: 输入新的文件夹笔记名称

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 从排除的文件夹中移除文件夹

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 从分离的文件夹中移除文件夹

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 从文件夹笔记中排除文件夹

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 在资源管理器中隐藏文件夹笔记

ast.name: setTitle

ast.target: 文件夹概览：找不到该文件夹

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: File name cannot contain any of the following characters: * " \ / < > : | ?
ast.target: 文件名不能包含以下任何字符：* \" \\ / < > : | ?

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: File name cannot end with a dot

ast.source: Successfully removed folder from excluded folders
ast.target: 已成功从排除的文件夹中移除文件夹

ast.target: 已成功从文件夹笔记中排除文件夹

ast.source: A folder with the same name already exists

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Indexing files for folder overview plugin...
ast.target: 正在为文件夹概览插件索引文件...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Indexed files for folder overview plugin.
ast.target: 已为文件夹概览插件索引文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error creating folder overview (folder notes plugin) - check console for more details
ast.target: 创建文件夹概览时出错（文件夹笔记插件） - 请检查控制台获取更多详情

ast.name: name
ast.source: You need to set the Templates folder in the Templater settings first.
ast.target: 您需要先在 Templater 设置中设置模板文件夹。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Use this file as the folder note for its parent folder
ast.target: 将此文件用作其父文件夹的文件夹笔记

ast.name: name
ast.source: Make a folder with this file as its folder note
ast.target: 创建一个以该文件为文件夹笔记的文件夹

ast.source: Create Markdown folder note for this folder
ast.target: 为此文件夹创建 Markdown 文件夹笔记

ast.name: name
ast.target: 删除此文件夹的关联笔记

ast.name: name
ast.source: Delete folder note of current active folder in file explorer
ast.target: 删除文件资源管理器中当前活动文件夹的文件夹笔记

ast.name: name
ast.target: 打开此文件夹的关联笔记

ast.name: name
ast.source: Open folder note of current active folder in file explorer
ast.target: 打开文件资源管理器中当前活动文件夹的文件夹笔记

ast.name: name
ast.target: 从选区创建文件夹笔记

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Enter the name of the folder

ast.name: text
ast.source: A folder note for this folder already exists
ast.target: 此文件夹的文件夹笔记已存在

ast.name: text
ast.source: Are you sure you want to turn the note into a folder note and rename the existing folder note?
ast.target: 您确定要将此笔记转换为文件夹笔记并重命名现有的文件夹笔记吗？

ast.name: text
ast.source: It will be moved to your system trash.
ast.target: 它将被移至您的系统回收站。

ast.name: text
ast.source: It will be moved to your Obsidian trash, which is located in the ".trash" hidden folder in your vault.
ast.target: 它将被移至您的 Obsidian 回收站，该回收站位于您仓库中的 \".trash\" 隐藏文件夹内。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Create folder note for every folder
ast.target: 为每个文件夹创建文件夹笔记

ast.name: text
ast.source: Make sure to backup your vault before using this feature.
ast.target: 使用此功能前，请务必备份您的仓库。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This feature will create a folder note for every folder in your vault.
ast.target: 此功能将为您仓库中的每个文件夹创建一个文件夹笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Every folder that already has a folder note will be ignored.
ast.target: 已有文件夹笔记的文件夹将被忽略。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Every excluded folder will be ignored.
ast.target: 所有被排除的文件夹将被忽略。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Edit the default settings for new folder overviews,
ast.target: 编辑新文件夹概览的默认设置，

ast.name: text
ast.source: this won't apply to already existing overviews.
ast.target: 这不会应用于已存在的概览。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Find more information about the title in the documentation. There is also a list of variables you can use
ast.target: 在文档中查找关于标题的更多信息。那里还有一个可用变量列表。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Find more information about this setting in the documentation.
ast.target: 在文档中查找关于此设置的更多信息。
